query:
-- GBA billing items with no service linked
SELECT bi.id, bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%GBA%'
  AND (bi.serviceExternalId IS NULL OR bi.serviceExternalId = '')
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Check what GBA services already have revenue (to understand what's matched)
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
FROM services
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0101'
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC;
